message:
feat: CLI invocation-name override for single-binary dispatch (br-163x)

Add run_with_invocation_name() to the CLI crate so that when the CLI
surface is invoked through the mcp-agent-mail binary via
AM_INTERFACE_MODE=cli, --help and usage strings render with the correct
program name instead of the raw argv[0].

- New parse_with_invocation_name() rewrites argv[0] and uses
  clap::Command::name()/bin_name() to override the rendered name
- run() delegates to run_with_invocation_name("am") as the default
- Graceful handling of clap errors (--help, --version, parse failures)
  with correct exit codes
- Tests verify help text renders correctly under both "mcp-agent-mail"
  and "am" invocation names

Also bump legacy python submodule pointer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
